w:r.w:t: Pupils will share their lunch with their friends in lunch time.
Pupils will bring their favorite toy and share it with their friend in game period.
Pupils will tell the importance of eyes.
IL will tie a piece of cloth on one kid’s eye and ask him about his feelings. She will explain them that how they will feel if they do not have eyes.
IL will explain the activities, and after that they will do their work independently on booklet
ges 45& 46.IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end. Pupils will do these activities on page no 46.
Food of the week k is Capsicum
Send notice in diaries “Bring capsicum in lunch”
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.

This activity requires plenty of space and lots of sunshine! Have the pupil pair up and then find a good space in general space with their partner. Designate one pupil as the "walker" and the other the "tagger."
Ask the pupil to find their shadows. On the signal "go" the tagger tries to "tag" the "walker" by stepping on his or her shadow. Have the pupil switch roles and continue playing
Where is the tomb of Allama Iqbal?
Ans: The tomb of Allama Iqbal is in Lahore.
Which Dua do we say when we are sneezing. Ans:
We say “Alhamdulillah” when we are sneezing.
How do you see the things?
We see things with our eyes.
